issue_summary: Use the ZIP64 structures to locate the central directory in ZipFile if the archive is a ZIP64 archive, fallback to 'the old way' if it is not a ZIP64 archive.
javadoc_before:
/**
     * Searches for the "End of central dir record", parses
     * it and positions the stream at the first central directory
     * record.
     */
javadoc_after:
/**
     * Searches for either the "Zip64 end of central directory
     * locator" or the "End of central dir record", parses
     * it and positions the stream at the first central directory
     * record.
     */
